name: Vyom Intelligence — Free Audit Lead Pipeline

nodes.name: 1. Webhook — Receive Lead
nodes.notes: Paste this webhook URL into your audit form's action. Receives: name, company, email, phone, url, challenge

parameters.responseBody: ={ "status": "received", "message": "Thank you! Your audit report will arrive within 24 hours." }

nodes.name: 2. Respond to Form
nodes.notes: Immediately respond 200 OK so the form doesn't hang

nodes.name: 5. Fetch Website HTML
nodes.notes: Fetches the lead's website HTML via allorigins proxy (free, no API key needed). Falls through to error handler if unreachable.

nodes.name: 8. Save to Google Sheets
nodes.notes: SETUP: Replace YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEET_ID_HERE with your Sheet ID. Create a sheet named 'Leads' with columns: Timestamp, Name, Company, Email, Phone, Website, Challenge, Score, GA4, GTM, MetaPixel, ServerSide, Issues, Passes, Status, AuditSentAt, Notes

nodes.name: 10. Claude AI — Draft Email
nodes.notes: SETUP: Replace YOUR_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY_HERE with your Claude API key from console.anthropic.com. Uses claude-haiku (cheapest — ~$0.001 per lead).

nodes.name: 12. Email Lead — Acknowledgement
nodes.notes: SETUP: Connect your Gmail account (hello@vyomintelligence.com) via OAuth in n8n credentials. Sends the AI-written audit acknowledgement email to the lead.

parameters.subject: =🔔 New Audit Lead: {{ $json.lead.company }} — Score {{ $json.audit.score }}/100
parameters.message:
=

New Audit Lead — Vyom Intelligence

Name{{ $json.lead.name }}
Company{{ $json.lead.company }}
Email{{ $json.lead.email }}
Phone{{ $json.lead.phone || '—' }}
Website{{ $json.lead.url }}
Challenge{{ $json.lead.challenge }}
Score{{ $json.audit.score }}/100
GA4{{ $json.audit.checks.ga4 ? "✅ Detected" : "❌ Missing" }}
GTM{{ $json.audit.checks.gtm ? "✅ Detected" : "❌ Missing" }}
Meta Pixel{{ $json.audit.checks.metaPixel ? "✅ Detected" : "❌ Missing" }}
Issues{{ $json.audit.issuesFound.join(" | ") }}

→ Send full audit report within 24 hours. Visit their site

nodes.name: 13. Alert You — Internal Email
nodes.notes: SETUP: Replace YOUR_OWN_EMAIL@gmail.com with your email. Sends you a formatted internal alert with all lead data + pre-audit results.

nodes.name: 14. Telegram Alert (optional)
nodes.notes: OPTIONAL: Free alternative to WhatsApp. Create a Telegram bot via @BotFather (free, 1 minute). Set TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN and TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID as n8n variables. Delete this node if not needed.

nodes.name: 16. Wait 23 Hours
nodes.notes: Pauses the workflow for 23 hours. After this, sends you a reminder to manually send the audit + sends lead a reminder email.

parameters.subject: =⏰ AUDIT DUE: {{ $json.lead.company }} — Send report now
parameters.message:
=

⏰ Audit Report Due — Send Now

You promised {{ $json.lead.name }} from {{ $json.lead.company }} an audit within 24 hours.

Their website: {{ $json.lead.url }}

Their email: {{ $json.lead.email }}

Their challenge: {{ $json.lead.challenge }}

Pre-audit score: {{ $json.audit.score }}/100

Key issues to cover in your report:

    {{ $json.audit.issuesFound.map(i => '
  • ' + i + '
    • ').join('') }}

Action required: Send their full audit report in the next 1 hour.

parameters.subject: =Quick update on your {{ $json.lead.hostname }} audit
parameters.message:
=Hi {{ $json.lead.name }},

Just a quick note — your audit for {{ $json.lead.hostname }} is being finalised and will be with you very shortly.

If you have any questions in the meantime, feel free to reply to this email.

Best,
Sagar | Vyom Intelligence
vyomintelligence.com

__SETUP_INSTRUCTIONS__.step1_n8n: Go to n8n.io → Sign up free (cloud) OR self-host on Railway/Render for free tier
__SETUP_INSTRUCTIONS__.step2_import: In n8n: New Workflow → top-right menu → Import from JSON → paste this file
__SETUP_INSTRUCTIONS__.step3_webhook: Activate the workflow → copy the webhook URL from node 1 → paste into your audit form's POST action
__SETUP_INSTRUCTIONS__.step4_google_sheets: Node 8: Connect Google Sheets credential → create a Sheet named 'Leads' with the columns listed in the node notes
__SETUP_INSTRUCTIONS__.step5_gmail: Nodes 12, 13, 17, 18: Connect your Gmail account via OAuth in n8n credentials
__SETUP_INSTRUCTIONS__.step6_claude_api: Node 10: Get free API key from console.anthropic.com → replace YOUR_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY_HERE. First $5 credit is free — enough for ~5000 leads.
__SETUP_INSTRUCTIONS__.step7_telegram_optional: Node 14: Create bot via Telegram @BotFather (free) → set TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN + TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID as n8n variables → or delete this node
__SETUP_INSTRUCTIONS__.step8_test: Use n8n's test webhook → send a sample POST with: name, company, email, phone, url, challenge fields → watch it run end to end
__SETUP_INSTRUCTIONS__.cost: Total cost to run this: $0/month (n8n free tier: 5 active workflows, 2500 executions/month). Claude API: ~$0.001 per lead (nearly free).
